features.name: Unified web portal
features.description: single login page where users authenticate with their ShyTalk account. Routes to Admin panel, MC Host panel, MC Singer panel, Teacher panel, or suggestions+roadmap based on role. Must be done BEFORE admin restructure (#41)

features.name: Admin role-based access control
features.description: internal admin roles (super-admin, moderator, viewer) controlling which tools each admin can use. Store roles in Firestore, enforce server-side

features.name: MC Host dedicated panel
features.description: separate login + dashboard for MC Hosts to manage games, participants, prizes. Isolated from main admin panel

features.name: MC Singer dedicated panel
features.description: separate login + dashboard for MC Singers to manage singing sessions, rooms, competitions

features.name: Teacher dedicated panel
features.description: separate login + dashboard for Teachers to manage teaching rooms, students, schedules

features.name: Web personal profile
features.description: full profile management on portal: avatar upload, display name, SuperShy status/purchase, coins, linked accounts, voting history, submitted suggestions. Needs its own design cycle

features.name: Web page i18n completion
features.description: full translations for all web pages including admin panel, legal pages. Language selector on every page
